violations.text: Strawberries and raspberries are not washed before use. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and mandolin) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Oat milk was observed held at 59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Water was observed in stacked blender cups. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
